title: NOT accuracy when mix block & non-block assignment

features.name: non_blocking_assignment_reads_blocking_updated_signal
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment in an always block that reads signals updated via blocking assignment in a task or initial block

features.name: continuous_assign_with_ternary_high_z
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment using ternary operator to drive high-impedance when a control signal is active

features.name: inout_bus_drive_from_reg
features.description: Code should include an inout bus driven by a reg variable through a conditional continuous assignment
